movies.title: Inception
movies.overview: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the task of planting an idea into the mind of a CEO.

movies.title: The Dark Knight
movies.overview: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc on Gotham, Batman must accept one of the greatest tests to fight injustice.

movies.title: Interstellar
movies.overview: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

movies.title: The Shawshank Redemption
movies.overview: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

movies.title: Pulp Fiction
movies.overview: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster and his wife intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.

movies.title: The Matrix
movies.overview: A computer programmer discovers that reality as he knows it is a simulation created by machines, and joins a rebellion to overthrow them.

movies.title: Fight Club
movies.overview: An insomniac office worker and a devil-may-care soap maker form an underground fight club.

movies.title: Forrest Gump
movies.overview: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson through the eyes of an Alabama man with a low IQ.

movies.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
movies.overview: A meek Hobbit from the Shire and eight companions set out on a journey to destroy the powerful One Ring.

movies.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
movies.overview: While Frodo and Sam edge closer to Mordor, the divided fellowship makes a stand against Sauron's new ally.

movies.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
movies.overview: Gandalf and Aragorn lead the World of Men against Sauron's army to draw his gaze from Frodo and Sam.

movies.title: Goodfellas
movies.overview: The story of Henry Hill and his life in the mob, covering his relationship with his wife and his mob partners.

movies.title: The Departed
movies.overview: An undercover cop and a mole in the police attempt to identify each other while infiltrating an Irish gang in Boston.

movies.title: Django Unchained
movies.overview: With the help of a German bounty-hunter, a freed slave sets out to rescue his wife from a plantation owner.

movies.title: The Wolf of Wall Street
movies.overview: Based on the true story of Jordan Belfort, from his rise to a wealthy stock-broker to his fall involving crime and corruption.

movies.title: Gladiator
movies.overview: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family.

movies.title: The Prestige
movies.overview: After a tragic accident, two stage magicians in 1890s London engage in a battle to create the ultimate illusion.

movies.title: Se7en
movies.overview: Two detectives hunt a serial killer who uses the seven deadly sins as his motifs.

movies.title: The Silence of the Lambs
movies.overview: A young FBI cadet must receive the help of an incarcerated cannibalistic serial killer to catch another serial killer.

movies.title: Saving Private Ryan
movies.overview: Following the Normandy Landings, a group of U.S. soldiers go behind enemy lines to retrieve a paratrooper.

movies.title: Schindler's List
movies.overview: In German-occupied Poland during World War II, Oskar Schindler gradually becomes concerned for his Jewish workforce.

movies.title: The Godfather
movies.overview: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his empire to his reluctant son.

movies.title: The Godfather Part II
movies.overview: The early life and career of Vito Corleone in 1920s New York is portrayed, while his son expands and tightens his grip on the family crime syndicate.

movies.title: Blade Runner 2049
movies.overview: Young Blade Runner K's discovery of a long-buried secret leads him to track down former Blade Runner Rick Deckard.

movies.title: Dune
movies.overview: Paul Atreides unites with the Fremen people of the desert planet Arrakis to fight for his family's legacy.

movies.title: Dune: Part Two
movies.overview: Paul Atreides unites with the Fremen to seek revenge against those who destroyed his family.

movies.title: Parasite
movies.overview: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between a wealthy family and a destitute clan.

movies.title: Whiplash
movies.overview: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cut-throat music conservatory where his dreams of greatness are mentored by an instructor.

movies.title: La La Land
movies.overview: While navigating their careers in Los Angeles, a pianist and an actress fall in love while pursuing their dreams.

movies.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
movies.overview: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search of her homeland.

movies.title: The Social Network
movies.overview: As Harvard student Mark Zuckerberg creates the social networking site that would become Facebook, he is sued by the twins who claim he stole their idea.

movies.title: Zodiac
movies.overview: In the late 1960s, a San Francisco cartoonist becomes an amateur detective obsessed with tracking down the Zodiac Killer.

movies.title: Inglourious Basterds
movies.overview: In Nazi-occupied France, a plan to assassinate Nazi leaders by a group of Jewish U.S. soldiers coincides with a theatre owner's vengeful plans.

movies.title: Kill Bill: Volume 1
movies.overview: After awakening from a four-year coma, a former assassin wreaks vengeance on the team of assassins who betrayed her.

movies.title: Arrival
movies.overview: A linguist works with the military to communicate with alien lifeforms after twelve mysterious spacecrafts appear around the world.

movies.title: Joker
movies.overview: Arthur Fleck, a party clown, leads an impoverished life. However, when society shuns him, he begins a slow descent into madness.

movies.title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
movies.overview: A writer encounters the owner of an aging high-class hotel, who tells him of his early years serving as a lobby boy.

movies.title: No Country for Old Men
movies.overview: Violence and mayhem ensue after a hunter stumbles upon a drug deal gone wrong and more than two million dollars in cash.

movies.title: There Will Be Blood
movies.overview: A ruthless silver miner-turned-oil prospector competes with a local preacher as he begins to build an oil empire.

movies.title: The Revenant
movies.overview: A frontiersman on a fur trading expedition in the 1820s fights for survival after being mauled by a bear.

movies.title: Oppenheimer
movies.overview: The story of American scientist J. Robert Oppenheimer and his role in the development of the atomic bomb.

movies.title: Tenet
movies.overview: Armed with only one word, a CIA operative journeys through time to prevent World War III.

movies.title: Once Upon a Time in Hollywood
movies.overview: A faded television actor and his stunt double strive to achieve fame and success in the final years of Hollywood's Golden Age.

movies.title: Catch Me If You Can
movies.overview: A seasoned FBI agent pursues a brilliant young con artist who successfully posed as a pilot, doctor, and lawyer.

movies.title: The Truman Show
movies.overview: An insurance salesman discovers his whole life is actually a reality TV show.

movies.title: Memento
movies.overview: A man with short-term memory loss attempts to track down his wife's murderer.

movies.title: Shutter Island
movies.overview: In 1954, a U.S. Marshal investigates the disappearance of a murderer who escaped from a hospital for the criminally insane.

movies.title: The Batman
movies.overview: When a sadistic serial killer begins murdering key political figures in Gotham, Batman is forced to investigate.

movies.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
movies.overview: A middle-aged Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure where she alone can save existence.

movies.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
movies.overview: Teen Miles Morales becomes the Spider-Man of his universe and must join with five spider-powered individuals to stop a threat.
